label: Intent-weighted refresh

prices.claimRule: Show current-price language only when the snapshot is fresh and confidence is medium or high.

subscriptions.claimRule: Show PS Plus availability as confirmed only when the record is fresh and confidence is medium or high.

priorityBands.label: Hot intent
priorityBands.description: Saved games, strong wishlist signals, top recommendations, and high discounts.

priorityBands.label: Warm intent
priorityBands.description: Backlog, medium-fit recommendations, and games close to the user's budget.

priorityBands.label: Cold catalog
priorityBands.description: Long-tail catalog items refreshed only when a user action or recommendation needs them.

claimRules: Never treat generated AI text as a source of truth for prices or subscription availability.
If a price snapshot is sample, stale, missing, or low confidence, show it as a signal and ask the user to verify before buying.
If PS Plus data is sample, stale, missing, or low confidence, avoid confirmed availability language.
Refresh the user's wishlist and price-watch games before refreshing the broad catalog.
